-- SQL Trace: School Management System
-- Generated by TeaQL 4.0.3
-- Audit mode: production

-- 1. Schema initialization
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS platform_data (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    short_name TEXT,
    description TEXT,
    create_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    update_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    version INTEGER DEFAULT 0
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS school_type_data (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    code TEXT NOT NULL,
    platform_id INTEGER REFERENCES platform_data(id),
    version INTEGER DEFAULT 0
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS school_status_data (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    code TEXT NOT NULL,
    platform_id INTEGER REFERENCES platform_data(id),
    version INTEGER DEFAULT 0
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS school_data (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    short_name TEXT,
    address TEXT,
    phone TEXT,
    email TEXT,
    founded_date DATE,
    motto TEXT,
    logo_url TEXT,
    create_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    update_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    platform_id INTEGER REFERENCES platform_data(id),
    school_type_id INTEGER REFERENCES school_type_data(id),
    school_status_id INTEGER REFERENCES school_status_data(id),
    version INTEGER DEFAULT 0
);

-- 2. Sample data insertion
INSERT INTO platform_data (name, short_name) VALUES ('EduTech Platform', 'EduTech');

INSERT INTO school_type_data (name, code, platform_id) VALUES 
    ('Primary', 'PRIMARY', 1),
    ('Secondary', 'SECONDARY', 1);

INSERT INTO school_status_data (name, code, platform_id) VALUES 
    ('Active', 'ACTIVE', 1),
    ('Inactive', 'INACTIVE', 1),
    ('Pending', 'PENDING', 1),
    ('Closed', 'CLOSED', 1);

-- 3. Query execution trace
-- Q::platforms().execute_by_id(&ctx, 1)
SELECT * FROM platform_data WHERE id = 1;

-- Q::schools().execute_for_list(&ctx)
SELECT * FROM school_data WHERE marked_as_deleted = 0;

-- Q::schools().with_name_containing("Springfield").execute_for_list(&ctx)
SELECT * FROM school_data WHERE name LIKE '%Springfield%' AND marked_as_deleted = 0;

-- Q::schools().with_school_status_is_active().execute_for_list(&ctx)
SELECT s.* FROM school_data s
JOIN school_status_data ss ON s.school_status_id = ss.id
WHERE ss.code = 'ACTIVE' AND s.marked_as_deleted = 0;

-- Q::schools().order_by_name_asc().execute_for_list(&ctx)
SELECT * FROM school_data WHERE marked_as_deleted = 0 ORDER BY name ASC;

-- Q::schools().execute_for_count(&ctx)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM school_data WHERE marked_as_deleted = 0;

-- Q::schools().page(2, 3).execute_for_list(&ctx)
SELECT * FROM school_data WHERE marked_as_deleted = 0 LIMIT 3 OFFSET 3;

-- 4. Aggregation trace
-- Q::schools().group_by_school_status().aggregate_count("count").execute_for_records(&ctx)
SELECT ss.name as school_status, COUNT(*) as count
FROM school_data s
JOIN school_status_data ss ON s.school_status_id = ss.id
WHERE s.marked_as_deleted = 0
GROUP BY ss.name;

-- 5. CRUD trace
-- Create
INSERT INTO school_data (name, short_name, address, phone, email, motto, platform_id, school_type_id, school_status_id)
VALUES ('Oakwood Academy', 'OAK', '456 Oak Avenue', '400-111-2222', 'contact@oakwood.edu', 'Growing Excellence', 1, 1, 1);

-- Update
UPDATE school_data SET motto = 'Excellence in Every Student', version = version + 1 WHERE id = 11;

-- Delete (soft)
UPDATE school_data SET marked_as_deleted = 1, version = version + 1 WHERE id = 21;
